Title: Shin Kamen Rider
Actors: Sôsuke Ikematsu, Minami Hamabe, Tasuku Emoto
Plot: College student and motorcycle enthusiast Takeshi Hongo is abducted by the evil organization Shocker and converted into a cyborg as part of their plans for world domination. Before they can brainwash him to do their bidding, he escapes and uses his new enhanced abilities as Kamen Rider to wage a one-man war against Shocker.
